narrative:
Precinct Green Township D (precinct in Scioto County) has 371 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a clear Republican lean of 6.5 percentage points.
